games.title: Stars Connection
games.shortDescription: You play as an astronaut floating around planets, and your goal is to connect stars by drawing lines between them.

games.title: Rotate Island
games.shortDescription: Rotate Island is a platformer game. Your character live in a world every platfome can be roate.

aboutSection.title: About Cardboard Digital
aboutSection.text: Cardboard Digital Studio is an independent games research and prototype lab. Every week, we craft a brand new micro-game experiment right here on this blueprint desk. Play our prototypes, rate them, and share your feedback directly to help us build a real dream game. Thank you for scanning our craft!
